title: Supply Chain Resilience in Developing Markets
articleTitle: A Microeconomic Analysis of Supply Chain Disruptions 2026
details: This study explores how small and medium enterprises in emerging markets adapt to global supply chain shocks. We utilize high-frequency data to track price transmission and inventory management strategies across various industrial clusters.

title: Monetary Policy in Low-Inflation Environments
articleTitle: Global Trends in Central Banking and Inflation Targeting
details: An extensive review of macroeconomic policy effectiveness in regions experiencing persistent low inflation. This research initiative focuses on the transition from traditional targeting to more flexible frameworks in the post-pandemic era.

title: Trade Liberalization and Digital Services
articleTitle: Cross-Border Data Flows and Trade Agreements
details: This completed study analyzes the impact of digital trade chapters in recent regional trade agreements. It quantifies the gains from reduced barriers to cross-border data services and digital goods.

title: Fiscal Decentralization and Rural Development
articleTitle: Local Governance and Resource Allocation Effectiveness
details: A collaborative effort exploring how fiscal decentralization impacts the quality of local public goods. The research highlights best practices for resource allocation in education and healthcare infrastructure.
